_comment: The Elements' sky palette (FW4): painting-sampled keyframes, moved out of game/world/day_night.gd so the framework file carries no valley art. Each key is [hour, sky_top, sky_horizon, sun_color], colors as [r, g, b] 0..1. Hours must be ascending and the list should bracket 0..24 (the loader clamps to the first/last key outside that range).
